prophecies.q: 圣母关于祈祷与斋戒的讯息
prophecies.a: 「你们要用心祈祷。不只是嘴上的祈祷，而是心灵的祈祷。你们要在周三和周五守斋——只食面包和水。斋戒与祈祷能制止战争，能改变自然法则。」
prophecies.q_en: Our Lady's message on prayer and fasting
prophecies.a_en: "You must pray with your heart. Not just with your lips, but with your heart. You are to fast on Wednesdays and Fridays — on bread and water only. Fasting and prayer can stop wars and change the laws of nature."

prophecies.a: 「你们要皈依！不要等到圣母给你们的标记出现才皈依，因为对于那些不信的人，当标记出现时就太迟了。你们这些信的人，现在就要皈依，加深你们的信仰。」
prophecies.a_en: "You must convert! Do not wait for the sign I will give you before you convert, because for those who do not believe, when the sign comes it will be too late. You who believe, convert now and deepen your faith."

prophecies.q: 圣母在首次显现时的核心呼唤
prophecies.a: 「亲爱的孩子们！我是你们的母亲，和平女王。我来到这里是要告诉你们：天主存在。天主派遣了我。我呼唤你们走向和平。要和平！在你们心中寻找和平，在你们周围建造和平。」
prophecies.q_en: Our Lady's core call at the first apparition
prophecies.a_en: "Dear children! I am your Mother, the Queen of Peace. I have come to tell you that God exists. God has sent me. I call you to peace. Be at peace! Seek peace in your hearts and build peace around you."

prophecies.a: 圣母向神视者揭示的第一个秘密。神视者称这些秘密涉及将在世界上发生的重大事件。第一秘密的具体内容从未被公开披露，但神视者暗示这些事件将在他们有生之年发生。Mirjana曾表示，当秘密揭示的事件开始发生时，人们将理解为什么圣母选择在默主哥耶停留如此之久。
prophecies.a_en: The first secret revealed by Our Lady to the visionaries. The visionaries say these secrets concern significant events that will occur in the world. The specific content of the first secret has never been publicly disclosed, but the visionaries have hinted that these events will occur within their lifetimes. Mirjana has said that when the events of the secrets begin to unfold, people will understand why Our Lady chose to remain in Medjugorje for so long.

prophecies.a: 圣母向神视者揭示的第二个秘密。与第一秘密一样，具体内容未被公开。Mirjana曾表示，前两个秘密是关于默主哥耶当地的警告性事件。
prophecies.a_en: The second secret revealed by Our Lady to the visionaries. Like the first secret, its specific content has not been disclosed. Mirjana has stated that the first two secrets are warnings concerning events in Medjugorje itself.

prophecies.q: 第三秘密：可见的超自然标记
prophecies.a: 圣母许诺将在她首次显现的波德布尔多山上留下一个永久的、超自然的、不可摧毁的、可见的标记。这个标记的目的是让所有仍然不信的人归信。神视者Mirjana已将这一秘密的日期和细节写成密封信件，交给了一位神父保管。
prophecies.q_en: The Third Secret: a visible supernatural sign
prophecies.a_en: Our Lady has promised to leave a permanent, supernatural, indestructible, and visible sign on Podbrdo hill where she first appeared. The purpose of this sign is to bring all remaining non-believers to faith. Visionary Mirjana has written the date and details of this secret in a sealed letter entrusted to a priest.

prophecies.a: 圣母揭示的第四个秘密。具体内容保密。据神视者称，十大秘密中有些涉及全世界，有些涉及神视者个人，有些涉及默主哥耶当地。
prophecies.a_en: The fourth secret revealed by Our Lady. Its content remains sealed. According to the visionaries, some of the ten secrets concern the whole world, some concern the visionaries personally, and some concern the local area of Medjugorje.

prophecies.a: 圣母揭示的第五个秘密。具体内容保密。神视者们一致表示，这些秘密将按顺序逐一实现。在每个秘密即将实现的前十天，Mirjana会将内容告知一位指定神父，由该神父在事件发生前三天向世人公布。
prophecies.a_en: The fifth secret revealed by Our Lady. Its content remains sealed. The visionaries consistently state that these secrets will unfold in sequence. Ten days before each secret is to be fulfilled, Mirjana will inform a designated priest, who will announce it to the world three days before the event.

prophecies.a: 圣母揭示的第六个秘密。具体内容保密。
prophecies.a_en: The sixth secret revealed by Our Lady. Its content remains sealed.

prophecies.q: 第七秘密：因祈祷被化解的灾难
prophecies.a: 圣母揭示的第七个秘密原本涉及一场威胁世界的灾难。神视者Mirjana透露，这一灾难已因信众的祈祷和斋戒而被消除。这被视为祈祷力量的重要证明——圣母反复教导说，祈祷与斋戒可以改变自然法则、制止战争。
prophecies.q_en: The Seventh Secret: a disaster averted through prayer
prophecies.a_en: The seventh secret originally involved a catastrophe that threatened the world. Visionary Mirjana revealed that this disaster has been averted through the prayers and fasting of the faithful. This is seen as significant proof of the power of prayer — Our Lady has repeatedly taught that prayer and fasting can change the laws of nature and stop wars.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 神视者Mirjana明确表示，第七秘密中原本涉及的灾难已因信众的祈祷而被消除（从灾难降格或完全化解）。这一说法来自神视者本人的多次公开证词，但因秘密的具体内容从未披露，无法独立核实灾难的原始内容或其是否确实被「化解」。
prophecies.verdict_en: Visionary Mirjana has explicitly stated that the disaster originally contained in the seventh secret has been averted through the prayers of the faithful (downgraded or entirely eliminated). This claim comes from the visionary's own repeated public testimony, but since the specific content of the secret was never disclosed, the original nature of the disaster and whether it was truly 'averted' cannot be independently verified.

prophecies.a: 圣母揭示的第八个秘密。具体内容保密。
prophecies.a_en: The eighth secret revealed by Our Lady. Its content remains sealed.

prophecies.a: 圣母揭示的第九个秘密。具体内容保密。Mirjana在接受采访时曾表示，第九和第十秘密非常严重，涉及对世界的惩罚。这些惩罚无法通过祈祷消除，但可以被减轻。
prophecies.a_en: The ninth secret revealed by Our Lady. Its content remains sealed. In interviews, Mirjana has stated that the ninth and tenth secrets are very serious and involve chastisements for the world. These chastisements cannot be eliminated through prayer but can be mitigated.

prophecies.a: 圣母揭示的第十个也是最后一个秘密。具体内容保密。据Mirjana所述，第十秘密极为严重。六位神视者中，Mirjana、Ivanka和Jakov已接受了全部十个秘密，而Ivan、Vicka和Marija截至目前已接受九个秘密，圣母仍每日向他们显现。
prophecies.a_en: The tenth and final secret revealed by Our Lady. Its content remains sealed. According to Mirjana, the tenth secret is extremely serious. Of the six visionaries, Mirjana, Ivanka, and Jakov have received all ten secrets, while Ivan, Vicka, and Marija have received nine secrets so far, and Our Lady still appears to them daily.

prophecies.q: 圣母关于南斯拉夫战争的预警
prophecies.a: 在南斯拉夫解体前，圣母多次呼吁和平与和解，告诫说若人们不归向天主、不祈祷，将有巨大的苦难降临这片土地。圣母说：「如果你们不祈祷，你们将不会拥有和平。」
prophecies.q_en: Our Lady's warning about the Yugoslav Wars
prophecies.a_en: Before the breakup of Yugoslavia, Our Lady repeatedly called for peace and reconciliation, warning that if people did not turn to God and pray, great suffering would come to the land. Our Lady said: 'If you do not pray, you will not have peace.'
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1991-2001年间，前南斯拉夫爆发了一系列战争，包括克罗地亚独立战争（1991-1995）、波斯尼亚战争（1992-1995）和科索沃战争（1998-1999），造成超过14万人死亡、数百万人流离失所。默主哥耶本身位于波斯尼亚，直接经历了战火。
prophecies.verdict_en: From 1991-2001, the former Yugoslavia experienced a series of wars including the Croatian War of Independence (1991-1995), the Bosnian War (1992-1995), and the Kosovo War (1998-1999), causing over 140,000 deaths and millions displaced. Medjugorje itself, located in Bosnia, was directly affected by the conflict.
prophecies.yearReason: 默主哥耶圣母在显现信息中提及
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mentioned in the apparition messages at Medjugorje

prophecies.q: 圣母关于每月二十五日讯息的承诺
prophecies.a: 圣母通过神视者Marija每月二十五日向世界传递一条讯息。这些讯息持续呼吁和平、祈祷、斋戒、皈依与信仰——即「五块石头」。圣母说：「亲爱的孩子们，今天我再次呼唤你们祈祷。你们不知道没有祈祷的生命是多么宝贵。当你们不祈祷的时候，你们将无法感受到天主的爱。」
prophecies.q_en: Our Lady's promise of the 25th-of-month messages
prophecies.a_en: Our Lady delivers a message to the world on the 25th of each month through visionary Marija. These messages consistently call for peace, prayer, fasting, conversion, and faith — the 'Five Stones.' Our Lady said: 'Dear children, today I call you again to prayer. You do not know how precious life without prayer is. When you do not pray, you cannot feel God's love.'

prophecies.q: 梵蒂冈对默主哥耶灵修活动的认可
prophecies.a: 2024年9月19日，梵蒂冈教义部在教宗方济各的批准下发布公告，对默主哥耶现象授予「无异议」（nihil obstat）认可。公告肯定了默主哥耶带来的丰硕灵修果实——大量皈依、圣事复兴（尤其是告解和圣体圣事）、司铎和修道圣召涌现、婚姻和家庭生活的更新——但明确表示不对显现的超自然性质作出判定。
prophecies.a_en: On September 19, 2024, the Vatican's Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith, with Pope Francis's approval, issued a note granting 'nihil obstat' (no objection) to the Medjugorje phenomenon. The note recognized abundant spiritual fruits — numerous conversions, sacramental renewal (especially confession and the Eucharist), priestly and religious vocations, and renewal of marriage and family life — while explicitly stating it makes no declaration on the supernatural character of the apparitions.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2024年9月19日，梵蒂冈教义部部长费尔南德斯枢机签署公告，经教宗方济各2024年8月28日接见时批准，正式对默主哥耶现象授予「无异议」认可。这是梵蒂冈43年来首次对默主哥耶作出正式表态，标志着教会承认其灵修价值，但审慎地未对超自然性质作出判定。
prophecies.verdict_en: On September 19, 2024, Cardinal Fernández, prefect of the Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith, signed the note granting 'nihil obstat' to the Medjugorje phenomenon, approved by Pope Francis during an August 28, 2024 audience. This was the Vatican's first formal pronouncement on Medjugorje in 43 years, marking the Church's recognition of its spiritual value while prudently not judging its supernatural character.
prophecies.yearReason: 默主哥耶圣母在显现信息中提及
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mentioned in the apparition messages at Medjugorje
